title: FunnelList
description: funnel.list — entries in one funnel stage. Stages mirror docs/vision.md §Layer 2 and the on-disk rommel/<stage>/ folders. A missing rommel/ directory is not an error: a workspace without a funnel returns an empty list.

FunnelStage.title: FunnelStage
FunnelStage.description: One of the six pipeline stages, kebab-case to match the on-disk folder names.

name.description: Basename of the entry under rommel/<stage>/. Markdown files conventionally; the daemon does not enforce an extension.

mtime.description: Last modified, RFC 3339. The funnel UI uses this to sort 'recently active' cards.

entries.description: Entries in the stage, sorted by name. Subdirectories under rommel/<stage>/ are skipped — v1's funnel is one level deep.
